title: Question / Unexpected behaviour
body:
I am trying to get a flat gate-level verilog from a top verilog design ( from multiple files.)
i have a folder / folders with verilog files and i would like the synthesis pass will run on the entire design.

i am running: 
read_verilog /home/ord/synth_tests/arb.v
hierarchy -check -libdir /home/ord/synth_tests/; proc; opt; techmap; opt; flatten;
write_verilog synth.v

But i still got instances inside the output file ( synth.v ) which were not flattened and synthed.
what am i missing ? 

module arb.v(...)
...
mod_a inst_a(..); // **i expect this will be synth and written in the same file.**

endmodule

module mod_a (); ** not expecting to see hierarchical output after flatten**
..
endmodule

Thanks!
